title: davallia sinensis
intro: Davallia sinensis, also known as the golden fern or davallia, is a species of fern native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Davallia sinensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine.
